stemHtml: What is the effect of stress on a pilot’s arousal state and performance?

options.a: Levels of stress that are higher than the optimum value reduce performance levels.
options.b: An increase in stress levels below the optimum value decreases arousal levels.
options.c: Levels of stress that are higher than the optimum value increase performance levels.
options.d: Arousal is independent of stress but depends on an individual’s well being.
